title: digitaria filiformis var. prostrata
intro: Digitaria filiformis var. prostrata is a variety of grass, also known as creeping finger grass, a type of creeping grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Digitaria filiformis var. prostrata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing protection against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
